topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Indexing. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Database Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Indexing is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Indexing in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Indexing snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Indexing?
How does Indexing handle memory management?
